package rulecoverage

func NegativeEnvVarInErrorMessage() string {
    ruleID := "env_var_in_error_message"
    family := "security"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "`fmt.Errorf(\"... %s\", os.Getenv(\"SECRET_KEY\"))` or similar patterns that embed environment variable values in errors"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
